reviews.comment:
Realmente no lo conocía pensé que era otra cosa. Nosotros veníamos viajando y bajamos a dar unas vueltas por el centro de viedma pero no ofrecía mucho.  Quizá me falto recorrer más!

(Translated by Google)
I didn't really know it; I thought it was something else. We were traveling and stopped to walk around downtown Viedma, but it didn't have much to offer. Maybe I should have explored more!
